commands.review_summary:
The PR normalizes source-shaped image blocks in plugin-tools MCP results to the pinned SDK `{ type: "image", data, mimeType }` shape and adds regression coverage for that boundary.

PR surface: Source +33, Tests +35. Total +68 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the MCP boundary: current main passes array plugin-tool content through unchanged while the pinned SDK 1.29.0 schema requires image blocks with top-level `data` and `mimeType`. I did not replay the full live Chrome/CDP browser screenshot command in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; maintainers should accept or reject the pinned SDK result-shape direction and merge through normal checks if they accept it.

target.title: fix(mcp): include image source for screenshot results
